philosophy: Only human-approved roots from Root Review are canonical.

roots.reason: High-leverage root: a sentient being. Appears frequently inside compounds.
High-leverage root: oneself. Appears frequently inside compounds.

roots.concept: the physical form of a being
roots.reason: Fundamental being concept: the physical form of a being. Cannot be naturally reduced into simpler Fonoran roots.
High-leverage root: the state of being alive. Appears frequently inside compounds.

roots.concept: change position in space; all locomotion inherits from this
